list.title: History#list
list.description:
List sync events

list.title: client
list.description:
The createClientConfig() function will be called on client initialization and the returned object will become the client's initial configuration.

You may want to initialize your client this way instead of calling setConfig(). This is useful for example if you're using Next.js to ensure your client always has the correct values.

list.title: fixSelfReferencingComponents
list.description:
Fix component schemas that are self-referencing $refs — an Effect OpenAPI generation bug where annotated union arms that share AST nodes with other endpoints produce {"$ref":"#/components/schemas/X"} as the definition of X.

Resolves by finding the actual schema from a parent union's anyOf/oneOf that references the broken component, then inlining that schema.

list.title: getParseAs
list.description: Infers parseAs value from provided Content-Type header.

list.title: isPlainObject
list.description: Detects plain objects (including objects with a null prototype).

list.title: levenshtein
list.description: Levenshtein distance algorithm implementation

list.title: queryKeyJsonReplacer
list.description: Replacer that converts non-JSON values (bigint, Date, etc.) to safe substitutes.

list.title: readFile
list.description: Read a config file, returning undefined for missing files and throwing JsonError for other failures.

list.title: requiresExtensionsForCustomServers
list.description: For custom (non-builtin) LSP server entries, extensions is required so the client knows which files the server should attach to. Builtin server IDs and explicitly disabled entries are exempt.

list.title: resolveWorkspaceRoute
list.description: Resolve the effective workspace + adapter target for an incoming request URL, mirroring InstanceMiddleware / planRequest. Pure resolution only — performs no proxying and no response writes. Used by both the HTTP middleware and the WebSocket upgrade handler so the selection logic lives in one place.

list.title: serializeQueryKeyValue
list.description: Normalizes any accepted value into a JSON-friendly shape for query keys.

list.title: serializeSearchParams
list.description: Turns URLSearchParams into a sorted JSON object for deterministic keys.

list.title: stringifyToJsonValue
list.description: Safely stringifies a value and parses it back into a JsonValue.

list.title: stripOptionalNull
list.description: Strip {type:"null"} arms that Effect's Schema.optional adds to OpenAPI unions.

list.title: substitute
list.description: Apply {env:VAR} and {file:path} substitutions to config text.
